business_model.problem_solved: Identifying conversion leaks in landing pages

stakeholder_interviews.summary: Discussion about current marketing challenges and technical constraints
key_insights: Current funnel has 4% CTR but 0% conversion
Main bottleneck is landing page effectiveness
Technical team can implement basic tracking but lacks resources for complex integrations
action_items: Prioritize landing page optimization over new channel acquisition
Allocate budget for essential tracking tools
